_notes: Mercosur full members as of May 2026: 5 South American states. Bolivia became a full member in 2024 (after acceding in 2023). Venezuela was suspended in 2016 and is NOT included here. Associate members (Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Guyana, Peru, Suriname) are NOT included — only full members.
name: Southern Common Market
mission: South American trade bloc establishing a customs union and common market among its full members, with the broader goal of regional economic integration.
